changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.sql: UPDATE gps_track_data SET track_type = 'SIMPLIFIED_SHAPE' WHERE track_type = 'SIMPLIFIED'

changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.createView: SELECT gt.id, gt.file_id, gt.creator, gt.gpx_version, gt.meta_name, gt.meta_description, gt.meta_time, gt.meta_author, gt.track_name, gt.track_description, gt.start_date, gt.end_date, gt.track_duration_in_motion_secs, gt.track_duration_stopped_secs, gt.track_stop_count, gt.track_longest_stop_secs, gt.median_distance_between_points, gt.avg_distance_between_points, gt.max_distance_between_points, gt.did_filter_outlier_by_distance, gt.number_of_track_points, gt.track_length_in_meter, gt.track_type, gt.utm_zone, gt.create_date, gt.load_status, gt.load_messages, gt.duplicate_status, gt.duplicate_of, gt.activity_type, gt.activity_type_source, gt.activity_type_source_details, gt.garmin_activity_id, gt.meta_link, gt.update_date, gt.duplicate_details, gt.bbox_min_lat, gt.bbox_max_lat, gt.bbox_min_lng, gt.bbox_max_lng, gt.center_lat, gt.center_lng, gt.energy_gravitational_total_wh, gt.energy_gravitational_descent_wh, gt.energy_aero_drag_total_wh, gt.energy_rolling_resistance_total_wh, gt.energy_kinetic_positive_total_wh, gt.energy_net_total_wh, gt.energy_weight_kg_used, gt.power_watts_avg, gt.power_watts_moving_avg, gt.power_watts_max, gt.source_segment_index, gt.source_parent_track_id, gt.exploration_status, gt.exploration_score, gt.exploration_calc_date, gt.track_source, gt.planner_profile, ixf.index AS f_index, ixf.name AS f_name, ixf.path AS f_path, ixf.base_path AS f_base_path, ixf.full_path AS f_full_path, ixf.size AS f_size, ixf.indexer_id AS f_indexer_id, ixf.last_modified_date AS f_last_modified_date, ixf.index_added_date AS f_index_added_date, ixf.index_update_date AS f_index_update_date, ixf.indexer_status AS f_indexer_status, ixf.last_message AS f_last_message, gd.id AS gd_id, gd.create_date AS gd_create_date, gd.precision_in_meter AS gd_precision_in_meter, gd.track_type AS gd_track_type, gd.track AS gd_track, gd_raw.id AS gd_raw_id, gd_raw.track AS gd_raw_track FROM gps_track gt LEFT JOIN indexed_file ixf ON gt.file_id = ixf.id LEFT JOIN gps_track_data gd ON gt.id = gd.gps_track_id AND gd.precision_in_meter = 1 AND gd.track_type = 'SIMPLIFIED_SHAPE' -- gd_raw joins the authoritative RAW_OUTLIER_CLEANED variant -- (precision 0). The previous view definitions joined on -- 'CLEANED' + precision 1 which never matched any row — -- gd_raw_track was always NULL in practice. Fixed here so -- consumers reading gd_raw_track actually get geometry. LEFT JOIN gps_track_data gd_raw ON gt.id = gd_raw.gps_track_id AND gd_raw.precision_in_meter = 0 AND gd_raw.track_type = 'RAW_OUTLIER_CLEANED'

update.column: SELECT id, activity_type AS grp FROM gps_track gt WHERE 1 = 1 -- OPTIONAL DATE_FROM and DATE_TO params. If NULL, they won't be applied as COALESCE uses start_date as fallback. AND gt.start_date >= COALESCE(TO_TIMESTAMP(:DATE_TIME_FROM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), gt.start_date) AND gt.start_date <= COALESCE(TO_TIMESTAMP(:DATE_TIME_TO, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), gt.start_date) AND gt.start_date >= '1971-01-01' AND gt.duplicate_status = 'UNIQUE' AND gt.load_status = 'SUCCESS' -- Planner: exclude planned routes (ideas) — they are never "done" tracks. AND gt.track_source = 'IMPORTED' -- OPTIONAL GEO CIRCLE: if GEO_CIRCLE_1_POINT is NULL, condition is skipped AND ( :GEO_CIRCLE_1_POINT IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gps_track_data gtd WHERE gtd.gps_track_id = gt.id AND gtd.precision_in_meter = 1000 AND gtd.track_type = 'SIMPLIFIED_SHAPE' AND ST_DWithin( gtd.track::geography, ST_GeographyFromText(:GEO_CIRCLE_1_POINT), CAST(:GEO_CIRCLE_1_RADIUS AS float8) ) ) ) -- OPTIONAL GEO RECTANGLE: if GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MIN_LAT is NULL, condition is skipped AND ( :GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MIN_LAT IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gps_track_data gtd WHERE gtd.gps_track_id = gt.id AND gtd.precision_in_meter = 1000 AND gtd.track_type = 'SIMPLIFIED_SHAPE' AND ST_Intersects( gtd.track, ST_MakeEnvelope( CAST(:GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MIN_LNG AS float8), CAST(:GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MIN_LAT AS float8), CAST(:GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MAX_LNG AS float8), CAST(:GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MAX_LAT AS float8), 4326 ) ) ) ) -- OPTIONAL GEO POLYGON: if GEO_POLYGON_1 is NULL, condition is skipped AND ( :GEO_POLYGON_1 IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gps_track_data gtd WHERE gtd.gps_track_id = gt.id AND gtd.precision_in_meter = 1000 AND gtd.track_type = 'SIMPLIFIED_SHAPE' AND ST_Intersects( gtd.track, ST_GeomFromText(:GEO_POLYGON_1, 4326) ) ) ) ORDER BY start_date
